story_types.title: Create Many Types of Stories
story_types.label: Story types
story_types.description: From child story and family story to dad tell me your story, mom tell me your story, grandma tell me your story, generate short story, marriage story, and friends story—one flow supports all.

items.title: Child story
items.description: Generate educational picture books and bedtime stories for kids, with a video generated from your photo as the hero and your voice reading aloud.

items.title: Family story
items.description: Warm short stories with family as the main characters—perfect to keep or give to parents and kids.

items.title: Dad / Mom / Grandma tell me your story
items.description: Dad tell me your story, mom tell me your story, grandma tell me your story—have your story read in a parent's or grandparent's voice and pass down memories as an audiobook.

items.title: Generate short story
items.description: Enter keywords or topics and AI writes a short story. Add a dynamic video and your voice to make a picture book or audiobook.

items.title: Marriage story
items.description: Love and marriage stories made for you or your partner—with dynamic video and voice narration.

items.title: Friends story
items.description: Custom short stories for friends with them as the hero—turn it into a picture book or audiobook as a gift.

introduce.title: What is Dream Weaver
introduce.label: Introduce
introduce.description: An AI platform that turns you or your family into the main character. Child story, family story, dad tell me your story, mom tell me your story, grandma tell me your story, generate short story, marriage story, friends story—we generate the story and video and read it in your voice.

items.title: Character from a Photo
items.description: Upload your photo, your child's, or anyone's. AI generates a dynamic video that appears as the hero in every scene.

items.title: Story You Co-Create
items.description: Enter keywords (e.g. dinosaurs, space, brushing teeth) and a learning goal (e.g. sharing, overcoming fear), or paste your own story. We support kids' tales and any theme you want.

items.title: Picture Book in One Go
items.description: Your story comes with a dynamic video as the hero (from your photo), in a unified style (watercolor, Pixar-like, etc.).

items.title: Audiobook in Your Voice
items.description: Clone your voice and add audio to video; the story is read aloud—for bedtime, gift audiobooks, or so kids can hear you when you're away.

benefits.title: Why Dream Weaver
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: For parents and kids who want bedtime picture books, and for anyone who wants personalized stories and audiobooks.

items.title: Create Without the Fuss
items.description: No more scrambling for a new story. Pick a theme, set a goal, or paste your own text—in minutes you have a custom tale with you or someone you care about as the hero, plus an audiobook.

image.alt: Create without the fuss — custom story in minutes

items.title: Stories That Stay Fresh
items.description: Every story is unique, with the hero you choose. Kids' education, adventure, gifts, memoirs—themes and styles are up to you.

image.alt: Stories that stay fresh — unique themes and styles

items.title: Your Voice When You're Away
items.description: Voice cloning lets you add audio to video so family can hear you read the story anytime—bedtime for kids, travel, or gift audiobooks.

image.alt: Your voice when you're away — family hears you read anytime

features.title: How It Works
features.description: Four simple steps from photo to your personalized story book and audiobook.

items.title: Upload Photo
items.description: Add your photo, your child's, or anyone's. AI generates a dynamic video that appears as the hero in the story.

items.title: Set Theme & Goal
items.description: Enter keywords (e.g. dinosaurs, space, brushing teeth) and an educational goal (e.g. learn to share, overcome fear), or paste your own story.

items.title: Generate Story & Video
items.description: Get a ~5 minute story with a dynamic video from your photo as the hero, in a consistent style you choose (e.g. watercolor, Pixar-like).

items.title: Listen in Your Voice
items.description: Clone your voice and add audio to video—your story plays as an audiobook so family can hear you read it anytime.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have more questions? Contact us at support@aiaudiotools.shop.

items.question: How do I add audio to video?
items.answer: After your story and dynamic video are ready, you record or upload a short voice sample. We clone your voice and add audio to video—the story is read aloud in your voice, perfect for child story, family story, or tell me your story dad/mom/grandma style audiobooks.

items.question: How does the video-from-photo hero work?
items.answer: You upload a photo (of yourself, your child, or anyone). Our AI generates a dynamic video from it that appears as the hero in the story.

items.question: Can I choose the video or visual style?
items.answer: Yes. You can pick from styles such as watercolor or Pixar-like. The same style is applied to the video and story for a cohesive look.

items.question: How does voice cloning work?
items.answer: We use a short sample of your voice to create a clone. The system then reads the story aloud in that voice—great for bedtime, gift audiobooks, or when you're not there.

items.question: How long is each story?
items.answer: Each story is designed to be about 5 minutes when read aloud, with a dynamic video as the hero.

items.question: Is my child's photo and data safe?
items.answer: We take privacy seriously. Photos and data are used only to generate your personalized content and are handled according to our Privacy Policy. We do not use your content for training unrelated models.

items.question: Is it only for children's stories?
items.answer: No. You can create kids' picture books and educational stories, or adventure stories, gift stories, and audiobook memoirs for yourself or friends—you choose the hero and the theme.

subscribe.title: Join the waitlist
subscribe.description: Be the first to know when we launch new features. No spam.
